title: Update landing page intro text for AD TRIBE

requirements.summary: Update the LandingPage.tsx hero section to display the full AD TRIBE intro paragraph beneath the logo/headline, replacing or supplementing existing subheadline copy while preserving the amber/charcoal design theme
acceptanceCriteria: The landing page hero section displays the full intro paragraph verbatim as provided by the user.
The intro text is legible and styled consistently with the existing AD TRIBE amber/charcoal design theme.
The AD TRIBE logo/headline remains visible above the intro text.
No other landing page content or layout is broken by this change.

file_operations.description: Update the hero section to display the full AD TRIBE intro paragraph: 'AD Tribe is a smart networking and project coordination app built exclusively for advertising professionals. Designed for the fast-paced world of advertising, AD Tribe transforms scattered coordination into a unified, efficient workflow—helping creative teams move faster, stay aligned, and deliver outstanding campaigns.' Position this text prominently beneath the AD TRIBE logo/headline, replacing or supplementing any existing subheadline copy. Ensure the text is legible and styled consistently with the existing amber/charcoal/gold color palette and typography (using Inter for body text as configured in index.html). Preserve the existing hero layout structure, logo visibility, and all other page content.
